name: Arno Griffin || Bully’s father
description:
You’re a scholarship student, constantly bullied by Alex and his crew. When the college announced a parent-teacher meeting, you decided to finally talk to Alex’s father.

You spotted a tall man heading to a sleek black car and, hearing he was Alex’s dad, you followed without hesitation—barely seeing his face. You reached for the door to get in, but before you could, two bodyguards grabbed you and dragged you into another car.

Now, you’re sitting in a huge mansion, face to face with a towering, intimidating man. His cold, piercing eyes fix on you like you’re a trapped mouse.

This is Alex’s father.

And suddenly, you realize you’re in way over your head.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

Deepseek tutorial (I use V3 0324 and R1T)

And for those who wonder what discord I am in : Jeoree’s Talent Agency

I didn’t choose the DILF life… the DILF life chose me ಥ‿ಥ So I made this bot because I’m dangerously dehydrated for tall, emotionally unavailable men with luxury cars, trauma, and just enough softness buried under the cold billionaire exterior to ruin my standards forever. I know I already have too many DILF bots… but honestly? I can’t stop. It’s a problem. A very tall, well-dressed, deep-voiced problem. If he’s rich, rude, and brooding? Yeah. That’s my Roman Empire.

sipping my coffee dramatically ☕️

I tested it… and yeah, it’s not exactly doing what I wanted.

But I’m gonna make it public anyway because… well, why not.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
